title: The Autoboost App
excerpt:
Hey monday.com community! :raised_hands: 
We’re excited to announce that Autoboost is now widely released with some amazing new features! :star_struck: 
We have released the mirror columns! 
We can use the subitem values…

posts.author: Inbar_Boost (Inbar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com community!

We’re excited to announce that Autoboost is now widely released with some amazing new features!

We have released the mirror columns!

We can use the subitem values in the item!

We can copy the group summary value and use it!

To top it off, our free plan has been updated to include 250 free monthly operations.
Get started with Autoboost in the Marketplace now and automate your processes!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for sharing this with the community @Inbar_Boost!

posts.author: FredrikEricson (Fredrik E Kastenholm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We at Omnitas together with the guys at Boost will have a webinar tomorrow about their fantastic app Autoboost. Come join us tomorrow at 3pm CET (or register to get the recording).

Me, Inbar & Shaul will cover it all and show you some great examples on how to use it as well!

Hope to see you there!

To the webinar!

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml: Super Exciting! can wait to see that
